legacy.content:
# Phase 11 Context: Content Scale, Archetype Compass, and Balancing
## Outcome
Ship the Phase 11 backlog as production-ready TypeScript/package features:
- Data-driven content scale for skills, dialogue clusters, and items. - Archetype compass as first-class runtime model for entities. - Deterministic balancing harness and reporting tools.
## Constraints
- Keep TypeScript runtime canonical. - Preserve deterministic replay contracts and canonical seed workflows. - Avoid hardcoded content growth in engine constructors. - Maintain docs-site and package consumer parity.
## Non-goals
- New backend services. - Combat grid introduction. - Reintroducing Python gameplay runtime.
## Acceptance Signals
- Archetype heading/compass visible in status surfaces. - Expanded content packs loaded from schema-validated contracts. - Balance harness outputs deterministic aggregate metrics. - Build, unit tests, replay smoke, and browser e2e all pass.
